Container.Name: BookLib
Container.Overview: BookLib is a self-hosted application for managing your entire book collection in one place: organize, read, annotate, sync across devices, and share without relying on third-party services.

Maintainer.DonateText: If you find this project useful, consider supporting development!

Container.Requires: MariaDB is required. See setup and configuration docs: https://booklib.org/docs/getting-started

Config.Name: Book Library
Config.Description: Your ebook/audiobook library. Support hardlinks if your server is already set to use them.

Config.Name: Book-Drop Location
Config.Description: Location of a watched folder where BookLib can detect, enrich, and queue books for import automatically.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: MariaDB Database connection URL. You must ensure the database is accessible from the container (ex: replace `mariadb` with the DB container's IP/hostname).

Config.Name: API_DOCS_ENABLED
Config.Description: Enable public API docs and OpenAPI JSON endpoints.

Config.Name: DISK_TYPE
Config.Description: Storage type: LOCAL (default) or NETWORK (disables file operations for network-mounted storage).

Config.Name: ALLOWED_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed cross-origin URLs for CORS (e.g. https://app.example.com). Defaults to '*' (allow all) if unset. Leave empty to restrict to same-origin.
